scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.railway:start: sh -c 'test -f artifacts/api-server/dist/index.mjs || pnpm run railway:build; ls -R artifacts/api-server/dist && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
